overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a vibrant futuristic city. The player navigates orange-paved sidewalks, crosses intersections with futuristic traffic, and walks under elevated highways past neon-lit storefronts.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial sidewalk with orange tactile paving

events.description: muscular pedestrian in white tank top passes very close to camera on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the orange tactile sidewalk, passing storefronts and neon signs

notable_agents.action: muscular man in white tank top and blue pants walking toward camera then passing by
pedestrian in casual clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: distinctive orange textured pavement covering the pedestrian walkway
storefront with green awning and signage reading RETROFIX
large colorful digital billboards mounted on buildings ahead
massive concrete elevated highway structure spanning the street ahead
tall modern street lamp with yellow pole

segments.scene_description: Walking along a vibrant orange tactile sidewalk in a futuristic city, passing the Retrofix storefront and various pedestrians. The elevated highway looms ahead while neon billboards and street lamps line the route.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing under elevated highway overpass

events.description: stepping off sidewalk onto yellow crosswalk, entering shadow of overpass
black van drives past from left to right in front of camera

agents.ego_description: crossing the street on yellow crosswalk lines, moving from sunlight into the shadow of the overpass

notable_agents.action: black van driving across the intersection from left to right

entered.detail: bold yellow striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt
massive concrete pillars supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street on yellow crosswalk lines while moving from bright sunlight into the shadow cast by the elevated highway. A black van passes by on the left as concrete support pillars dominate the right side of the frame.

scene_state.functional_zone: large urban intersection with multiple crosswalks and futuristic billboards

events.description: turning left at intersection, revealing large Milfguard billboard on the left
multiple futuristic vehicles including a silver sedan and red muscle car pass through the intersection

agents.ego_description: turning left and crossing the wide intersection, navigating between moving vehicles and groups of pedestrians

notable_agents.action: futuristic silver sedan driving through the intersection from right to left
group of four pedestrians waiting at the corner to cross the street

entered.detail: large green digital billboard displaying MILFGUARD advertisement with animated character
tall palm tree visible beyond the intersection
wide crosswalk with white and yellow striped markings spanning the large intersection

segments.scene_description: Turning left to face a large open intersection dominated by the Milfguard billboard. The player crosses the wide street while various futuristic vehicles drive through, and groups of pedestrians gather at the corners waiting to cross.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway under elevated highway with neon storefronts

events.description: entering the covered walkway under the elevated highway, lighting becomes significantly darker
passing the bright red neon sign for 2nd Amendment store on the right wall

agents.ego_description: walking through the shadowed corridor under the highway, passing other pedestrians and neon signs

notable_agents.action: woman in athletic wear with blue hair walking toward camera
construction worker in yellow hard hat walking in same direction as camera

entered.detail: shaded corridor running underneath the elevated highway structure
bright red neon sign reading 2ND AMENDMENT mounted on the wall
smooth concrete wall lining the right side of the walkway

segments.scene_description: Walking through a dimly lit covered corridor beneath the elevated highway. The environment is darker with artificial lighting from neon signs including a prominent red 2nd Amendment sign. Various pedestrians walk in both directions along the concrete walkway while traffic is visible on the road to the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a vibrant futuristic city, moving from a sunlit sidewalk into the deep shadows of an urban overpass and finally into a wide, neon-lit intersection. It begins by gliding along a bright orange tactile sidewalk past the Retrofix storefront and various pedestrians, with an elevated highway looming ahead. As the camera crosses the street on yellow lines, the bright sunlight vanishes, shifting into the heavy shade cast by the highway as a black van passes by concrete support pillars. The scene then opens up as the camera turns left, transitioning from the narrow underpass into a sprawling intersection dominated by a massive Milfguard billboard. Finally, the movement continues across the wide street amidst a flow of futuristic vehicles and groups of pedestrians gathered at the corners.

The shot follows a continuous first-person movement through a dimly lit urban underpass characterized by artificial neon glows. It begins by navigating a covered concrete corridor beneath an elevated highway, where the atmosphere is heavy and shadowed. As the camera moves forward, the environment is punctuated by the sharp red light of a 2nd Amendment sign and other flickering neon displays. The scene then flows past a stream of pedestrians walking in both directions, while the view to the left opens up to reveal the steady movement of futuristic traffic on the adjacent road.
